context:
🔎INTERLOCK INTEL
=================
📌Targets both Windows and Linux Environments
📌Appends the encrypted extension: 1nterlock, !NT3RLOCK and interlock
📌The DLS of Interlock Group is user friendly as Size of the Leak, Number of Files/Folders are present in each leak's section
📌This Group is capable to infiltrate and host large files on their Data Server ranging from 1.3GB to 710GB
📌Each Victim's data are hosted in separate TOR Domains
📌For Victim Negotiation, a Token is to be obtained after feeding the Organization ID and Email Address for the Chat Panel
📌The group displays a message "The time for negotiations is over. Good luck!" when the negotiation window is closed
📌The group targets all sectors including Healthcare
📌Interlock uses Cloudflare services to conceal their identity
📌Domains Associated with Libyan Spider Network
📌Asks clients to upload encrypted files to Anon Hosting Service called "anonymous files" on TOR: http://kqdrhdqaqeqc3txz7uekmesz3ny6rut477657gf2y5tnwkya7nv65pid.onion/
